original_text: Profitability metrics remained robust in Q2 2025, with gross margin at 51.81%, operating margin reaching 11.43%, and net margin at 10.83%. Net income grew 6.05% year-over-year to $18.2B, indicating effective cost management alongside revenue expansion. The operating income of $19.2B demonstrates the company's ability to convert top-line growth into bottom-line results.
revised_text: Profitability metrics remained robust in Q2 2025, with gross margin at 51.81%, operating margin reaching 11.43%, and net margin at 10.83%. Net income grew 6.05% quarter-over-quarter to $18.2B, indicating effective cost management alongside revenue expansion. The operating income of $19.2B demonstrates the company's ability to convert top-line growth into bottom-line results.
changes_summary: Changed 'year-over-year' to 'quarter-over-quarter' to accurately reflect the growth comparison shown in K002 (Q2 2025 vs Q1 2025 net income). All margin percentages are supported by K003-K005, net income figure by C005, operating income by C004, and growth rate by K002. Removed C003 and C013 from citations as K002 already captures the growth calculation and K003 captures gross margin.
